title: KOSMOS Permission v2 — Consent Ledger Record
description: Single append-only record in ~/.kosmos/consent_ledger.jsonl. Combines Kantara Consent Receipt v1.1.0 surface + ISO/IEC 29184:2020 notice binding + KOSMOS hash-chain + HMAC-SHA-256 seal. Canonical JSON = RFC 8785 JCS.

receipt_id.description: UUIDv7 receipt identifier (Kantara CR v1.1.0 surrogate).

version.description: Ledger record schema version. Append-only migration path — old records remain valid.

occurred_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp (tz-aware). Record insertion time, not adapter execution time.

subject_hash.description: SHA-256 of a stable subject identifier. Single-user MVP: hash of deterministic device-local salt.

data_items.description: PIPA §15(2) 2/4 — 항목. Ordered (canonical JSON preserves order).

refusal_right.description: PIPA §15(2) 4/4 — 거부권 고지문 with 불이익 explanation.

action_digest.description: SHA-256 over canonical (tool_id, arguments, timestamp-bucket). In bypassPermissions mode, includes UUIDv7 nonce to force per-call uniqueness (FR-B04).

granted.description: User consent outcome. Both True and False create ledger records (PIPA audit requires refusal evidence too).

prev_hash.description: SHA-256 of the previous record's record_hash. Genesis = 64*'0'.

record_hash.description: SHA-256 over RFC 8785 canonical JSON of this record with record_hash='' and hmac_seal=''.

hmac_key_id.description: Monotonic key id (k0001, k0002, ...). Enables rotation-aware verification.

hmac_seal.description: HMAC-SHA-256(key=hmac_key_id-resolved-key, msg=RFC 8785 canonical JSON of this record with hmac_seal='').

examples.refusal_right: 거부 시 본 기능을 사용할 수 없습니다.
